response:
* Zombo the mean ugly horrible clown ghost emerges from a tiny car roof to scream at Shaggy while defying gravity and physics because cartoon logic is a devil.
* Fred mistakes Jolly Jipner for a famous turnip celebrity named Jolly Jipner the actor and gets yelled at while blaming Red Herring who appears angry and vanishes into a plot hole.
* Velma excitedly shouts that the door opens stuff and the hot dogs caused an avalanche which is physically impossible yet somehow true in this nonsense world.
* The gang questions why a secret headquarters for cotton candy creatures exists in a park called Jipner's Joyland which sounds like a typo nobody ever corrected.
* Shaggy and Scooby eat four hundred fifty boxes of cereal to ride Monster Mountain but change their minds when Daphne reminds them of the ride they really wanted.
* Joey Jipner tries to sell the gang lifetime passes while hiding a safe full of money in his trailer which makes no sense if business is supposedly bad.
* The culprit is revealed as Joey who used clown props and blueprints to buy out his siblings while Red Herring proves Fred wrong by putting a clown nose on him.
